# The Developer Community

> A professional developer community for engineers who want to build real
> projects, ship to real users, and earn verified proof of work credits.

## What This Site Is
The Developer Community is a platform that connects developers with real,
production-level collaborative projects. Unlike toy side projects, every
project here reaches real users. Every contributor is publicly credited.
Every credit is resume-ready proof of work.

## Key Stats
- 1,284 active projects currently in progress
- 347 upcoming projects queued to launch
- Contributors earn public credits for every merged contribution

## Pages
- /projects — Browse all open projects and find teams to join
- /login — Access your account
- /register — Create a new account
- /profile — Your developer profile and portfolio

## Who Is This For
- Junior and mid-level developers who want verified portfolio work
- Senior developers who want to lead real teams
- Developers who want resume-ready proof of production contribution

## Contact
Email: hello@devcom.io
